sentences.arabic: بَحَثَتْ عَنْهُمَا فِي حَقِيبَتِهَا وَفِي الدَّرَجِ.
sentences.translation: Tražila ih je u torbi i u fioci.
sentences.translationEn: She looked for them in her bag and in the drawer.

sentences.translation: Konačno ih je pronašla ispod tepiha u svojoj sobi.
sentences.translationEn: She finally found them under the carpet in her room.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَضَعَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ فِي مَكَانِهِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je uvijek stavljati sve na svoje mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to always put everything in its place.
